# **Project Mosberg**

> **A modular suite of plugins and generators for the Perchance.org platform — built for creators, tinkerers, and worldbuilders.**

**Project Mosberg** provides a growing ecosystem of tools for text‑to‑image workflows, character generation, style presets, and creative automation on Perchance.

---

## 🚀 **Plugins**

### **T2I Framework Plugin — `t2i-framework-plugin-moss`**

A flexible text‑to‑image framework for building advanced Perchance generators.
**Live:** https://perchance.org/t2i-framework-plugin-moss
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/t2i-framework-plugin-moss#edit

---

### **T2I Styles — `t2i-styles-moss`**

A curated library of reusable text‑to‑image style presets.
**Live:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss#edit

---

### **T2I Styles Anime — `t2i-styles-moss-anime`**

Anime‑focused style presets for consistent character and scene generation.
**Live:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss-anime
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss-anime#edit

---

### **T2I Styles NSFW — `t2i-styles-moss-nsfw`**

A separate, opt‑in style pack for NSFW text‑to‑image workflows.
**Live:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss-nsfw
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/t2i-styles-moss-nsfw#edit

---

## 🧬 **Generators**

### **AI Character Generator — `ai-character-generator-moss`**

A flexible character generator with appearance, personality, and lore modules.
**Live:** https://perchance.org/ai-character-generator-moss
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/ai-character-generator-moss#edit

---

### **AI Pokémon Generator — `ai-pokemon-generator-moss`**

Creates new Pokémon species with typings, abilities, and flavor text.
**Live:** https://perchance.org/ai-pokemon-generator-moss
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/ai-pokemon-generator-moss#edit

---

### **AI Text‑to‑Image Generator — `ai-text-to-image-generator-moss`**

A general‑purpose T2I generator powered by the Mosberg framework.
**Live:** https://perchance.org/ai-text-to-image-generator-moss
**Edit:** https://perchance.org/ai-text-to-image-generator-moss#edit

---
